name: levithonlabs-ebilling-crm
description: Nepal-focused CRM + Billing + Invoice + Tax + eBilling Management Platform

scripts.predev: npm run build:packages && npm run db:generate
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=packages/types && npm run build --workspace=packages/nepal-ird-utils && npm run build --workspace=packages/database
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web

author: LevithonLabs
